response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via open-source GIS platforms, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or navigation systems, and his resume emphasizes JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang over the required systems programming languages and distributed geospatial pipelines.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platforms used in real-world mapping applications
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and deliver complex systems
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling with rigorous practices
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or navigation systems
Primary language focus is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not the required systems languages
Lacks clear evidence of distributed systems work for low-latency routing tile pipelines
